case_title: ROXY M. MADRID VS. PETER PHILLIP CERIMELI JR.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MADRID, ROXY M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CERIMELI JR., PETER PHILLIP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
